title: LG Magic Remote Control (MR25GA) Voice Remote Control with L G TVs Includes AI, Pointer and Alexa Voice, Compatible with LG Remote 2025 TVs OLED G5 C5 B5 Series QNED 92A 85A 80A Series
features: 【LG TV Remote】The all-new upgraded LG AI Magic Remote（MR25GA）.This MR25GA magic remote features AI voice recognition and pointers so you can control your TV with your voice at any time, whether you're busy or casual, and comes with pre-set 6 hot keys for one-click access. Simplicity and convenience are the advantages of MR25GA magic Remote Control, making your operation more convenient.

【Broad Compatibility】MR25GA magic remote compatible with lg OLED C5, B5, G5, and M5 Series models, include OLED42C5PUA, OLED48B5PUA, OLED65B5PUA, OLED65G5WUA, and many more (Details page for more compatible models). Please check the compatibility before you buy.
【Extended Range】With a range of up to 40 feet, remote offers exceptional flexibility, allowing you to control your television from a comfortable distance without any signal interruption or delay.

【3-Second Pairing】 First, load the battery (not included) for the AN-MR25GA for lg smart tv remote, then turn on the TV, long press the voice button, and the TV will prompt you to press the Wheel (OK) button for pairing and programming. If you've paired the remote before, you'll need to unpair it by holding down the "HOME" and "BACK" keys at the same time until the indicator lights up to clear the previous remote's pairing with the current TV.

【After-sale Service】Package including 1* lg tv remote control & 1*user manual(batteries not included).if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us directly and we will get back to you within 12 hours.

specifications_table.Product Features: No Programming Required, Universal, Voice Search
